stemHtml: Which of these statements about oxygen in transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: If the automatic passenger oxygen mask presentation fails, it is possible to retrieve an individual mask by opening the mask storage compartment with a sharp pointed object.
options.b: Chemical oxygen generators are used in the cockpit to supply the flight crew because of the low weight of this system.
options.c: It is not possible to visually verify when the oxygen flows to a passenger mask.
options.d: A chemical oxygen generator can be switched off.
